submittedGoals.title: Achieve Q2 enterprise pipeline target
submittedGoals.description: Close ₹2.4Cr in qualified pipeline with 3 new logo wins in manufacturing vertical.

submittedGoals.title: Ship mobile release v3.2 on schedule
submittedGoals.description: Deliver performance improvements and resolve P0/P1 defects before GA cut-off.

submittedGoals.title: Reduce churn in mid-market segment
submittedGoals.description: Improve renewal rate by 8% through proactive health checks and QBR cadence.
submittedGoals.managerComment: Clarify baseline churn % in next revision.

submittedGoals.title: Complete CRM migration phase 2
submittedGoals.description: Migrate remaining 4 business units with zero data-loss and <2h downtime window.

submittedGoals.title: Hire 10 senior engineers by Q2
submittedGoals.description: Fill critical backend and platform roles with avg. time-to-fill under 45 days.
submittedGoals.managerComment: Rejected — rebalance weightage; overlaps with TA OKR.

submittedGoals.title: Achieve SOC 2 Type II readiness
submittedGoals.description: Close all high-severity audit findings and complete control evidence pack.

submittedGoals.title: Increase NPS to 70+
submittedGoals.description: Launch in-app feedback loop and address top 5 detractor themes.

submittedGoals.title: Reduce L1 ticket resolution time
submittedGoals.description: Bring median first-response under 4 hours and resolution under 24 hours.

submittedGoals.title: Improve Q2 customer onboarding NPS
submittedGoals.description: Reduce onboarding drop-off by 15% through workflow automation and bi-weekly review sessions with customer success leads.

submittedGoals.title: Lead cross-functional sprint for mobile app feedback
submittedGoals.description: Coordinate with product and engineering to close the top 10 user-reported issues from the last release cycle.

submittedGoals.title: Mentor two junior analysts
submittedGoals.description: Conduct fortnightly 1:1s, review deliverables, and document a shared playbook for quarterly business reviews.

initialActivities.details: Overlaps with TA OKR — rebalance weightage.
